result.title: 商城业务排除客户和排除店铺，满立减叠加
result.error_message: [SKI313] 关键字 'evaluate' 重试 1 次后仍失败: [SKI302] JavaScript 执行失败: Page.evaluate: Error: business line option not found: B2b-基础业务 at chooseBusinessLine (eval at evaluate (:234:30), <anonymous>:21:1468) at async configureCombo (eval at evaluate (:234:30), <anonymous>:24:350) at async eval (eval at evaluate (:234:30), <anonymous>:31:8) at async <anonymous>:260:30 keyword: evaluate
